overall.description: A slow walk through a luxurious rooftop garden terrace in a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The camera moves steadily from an open landscaped area with palm trees toward and through a modern wooden pergola structure, with a dense neon-lit skyline visible in the background. High-quality game engine footage featuring detailed architectural rendering and natural lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious rooftop terrace during golden hour, with tall palm trees lining the left side and a modern wooden pergola visible ahead. The camera moves forward across paved tiles past a decorative rock garden, with a dense futuristic skyline and construction cranes visible in the distance under clear skies.

long rectangular planter box with greenery
tall rectangular outdoor lamps emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wooden pergola structure, transitioning from open sunlight to dappled shade. Moving through the covered walkway, it passes modern outdoor sofa seating and rectangular planters, with the wooden pillars and overhead beams framing views of the palm trees and futuristic skyline beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a luxurious rooftop terrace that transitions from an open, sun-drenched landscape into the dappled shade of a modern architectural structure. It begins by gliding across paved tiles past a decorative rock garden and tall palm trees, with a dense futuristic skyline and distant construction cranes visible under a clear golden hour sky. As the camera advances, the open environment shifts as it enters a wooden pergola, moving from bright sunlight into a rhythmic pattern of light and shadow. The scene then flows through the covered walkway, passing modern outdoor sofas and rectangular planters while the wooden pillars and overhead beams frame the surrounding greenery and neon-lit city beyond.
